calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Lipschutz, petitioner in pro per (by CourtCall).

The Court stated that there are still issues from the Examiner's Notes which have not been addressed. Mr. Lipschutz responded that he had just engages attorney Ora Prochovnick to represent him in the matter, but that she was not able to participate in today's hearing. He stated that his attorney expects to dismiss the petition. The Court then asked if the matter could be taken off calendar. Mr. Lipschutz responded in the affirmative. The Court ordered the matter off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Continued To Sep-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Lipshutz (via court call) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition for probate of will, that there are several issues raised by the examiner that have not been addressed, that there is a question as to whether probate is even necessary, that if the petitioner intends to go forward the Court will need written responses addressing the issues raised. Mr. Lipshutz asked for a 90 day continuance, that he would like to hire counsel and stated that the bank will not accept the Small Estate Affidavit without probate. The Court stated that it would not grant a 90 day continuance, that it encourages petitioner to get legal counsel and that he needs to take care of the issues or let the Court know that he will not be going forward. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to September 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
